quote: en=epunkine wa en=kore yan … 1SG.O=protect CONJ 1SG.O=give IMP … “Please protect me.”
issue: The translation ‘Please protect me’ omits the meaning of kore ‘give’, which is glossed as ‘1SG.O=give’.
suggestion: Revise the translation to include the ‘give’ component, e.g. ‘Please protect me and give to me’, or adjust the gloss if the form has a different meaning in context.
